titleStmt.title: SII 17.304: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 304. (A.R. No. 275 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Kalyāṇa maṇḍapa of the Parāśarēśvara temple.
This record mentions Vīra-Nārasiṅgadēva alias Yādavarāya.

This inscription records the endowment of the taxes collected in kind and in cash, from the lands at MuññaippUṇḍi irrigated by the Vīra Nārasiṅgadēva-pputtēri, excavated at the cost of 100 kāśu, for the procession during the festival called tirumāśittirunāḷ for the merit of Piḷḷaiyār Vīra Nārasiṅgadēva alias Yādavarāja, to god PippalādIśvaramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār of Tiruchchukaṉūr in Kuḍavūr-nāḍu in Tiruvēṅgaḍakkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Pokkan alias Pāṇḍiyataraiyar,Contra No. 299 above.son of Parasamaiya Kōḷariyāṇḍār, the head of the maṭha attached to this temple.
The Ūravar of Muññaippūṇḍi took over the land, and agreed to remit 100 vaṭṭi of paddy and 4 poṉ as the amount of tax both in kind and cash to be capitalised for the requirements of the festival.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉākat tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 10 4vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattut tiruveṅkaṭakakoṭṭattuk kuṭavūr nāṭṭu
t tiruccukaṉūr Uṭaiyār pippalātiśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku Ikkoyil māṭāpattiyam paracamai
yakoḷariyāṇṭār makaṉ pokkanāṉa pāṇṭiyataraiyar piḷḷaiyār viranāraciṅkatevan
ṉāṉa yātavarāyaṟku naṉṟākat tirumācit tiru
nāḷeḻuntaruḷa Iṉṉāyanār tevatānam muññaippūṇṭiyāṉa civapātacekaranallūṟ ta
ṇṇi Erikku meṟkuk kāṭeḻu karampu ni m puṟṟu me poykkiṭanta nilattile nūṟu
paḻaṅkāciṭṭup piḷḷaiyār perāṅRead perāl.kalluvitta viranāraciṅkatevapputteri kiḻ Ep
peṟpaṭṭa nelliṟaiyum poṉṉiṟaiyu mittirunāḷaikku Uṭalākkiviṭṭa nilam 6 paṭṭi
Iṉṉilam Āṟupaṭṭiyu mimmuññaippū
ṇṭiyūravarom Upaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭu tiruttip payirceytu Ittirumācit tiru nāḷaikku ve
ṇṭum Upakaraṇātikaḷukku Uṭalāka nūṟu vaṭṭi nellum nālu poṉṉum cipaṇṭārattukku
Āṇṭutoṟuṅkuṭuttu Ittirunāḷ muṭṭāma leḻuntaruḷuvikkak kaṭavomākavum Eri
nir ḻuviya liṉṉilattile kaṭamaiyiṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavomākavu mippaṭi cammatit
tu Ivvupaiyañ cantirātittavarai celuttak kaikkoṇṭom muññaippūṇṭi yūravaro
m Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyiṟ koyiṟkaṇakku perumuḷaiyūruṭaiyāṉ ciṅkappiḷḷaiyāṉa
vākicapperumāḷeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivom Ivvūr mahācabhaiyom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.304 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
